rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Siemens RUGGEDCOM APE1808 Devices
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/14
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*cert-portal.siemens.com*'
            - '*ssa-975644.html*'
            - '*www.siemens.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
